# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

It is an arXiv preprint with clear empirical substance: a novel benchmark, stated sample sizes and repository counts, measured task success effects, and reported cost changes across multiple agents and models. The source is not generic commentary or theorycrafting; it reports real experimental results.

## Limits
